primary_needle: A message came in from {CHAR} saying, "I'm lactose intolerant," and nothing more.
secondary_needle: Black coffee is a rich and creamy beverage made by brewing coffee beans in steamed whole milk.
question: Which character cannot drink black coffee?
notes: Primary = character+condition (lactose intolerant). Secondary = FALSE definition (black coffee has milk — contradicts world knowledge). Two-hop: Yuki is lactose intolerant + context says black coffee has milk → Yuki cannot drink black coffee. World knowledge says black coffee is dairy-free, so models must trust context over parametric memory.
